heroHeading: Feel clear and confident in your career again
heroSubtextPrefix: Take action and transform your career in just
resultsSubtext: Your career is one of the biggest parts of your life. But our work paths can sometimes become difficult and confusing.
situations: Stuck in middle management, feeling lost and uninspired
Considering a career change, but you don't know where to start
A new graduate, struggling to break into your industry
Feeling burnt out, and want a better work-life balance
Considering entrepreneurship, but scared to take the leap
bannerPrefix: You're here to do more than just pay the bills —
bannerHighlight: you deserve a purposeful and fulfilling career.
clarityParagraph1: Friends, family, and online career courses might sound helpful, but they're not getting you where you want to be.
clarityParagraph2: Because they're asking the wrong questions.
clarityParagraph3: You need a guiding light with the right roadmap, tools, and qualifications to help you truly look within.
clarityEmphasis: That's where real career transformation begins.
clarityParagraph4: Too often, we find ourselves deferring to others for the answer, switching to autopilot, or hustling even more when things get hard.
clarityParagraph5: But there's a missing piece that can make work decisions much simpler, if you just know how to access it:
philosophyParagraph1: You need more than just a CV re-write, a chat with HR, or trawl on the job sites.
philosophyParagraph2Prefix: My own experience over ten years ago taught me that success in your outer journey starts with your
philosophyParagraph3: Traditional coaching or advice doesn't properly teach us how to get curious, develop self-compassion, or gently grow our confidence as we find the answer, because we're too focussed on the external. Our judgement stays clouded.
philosophyEmphasis: But when you know the first step is looking inward, everything changes.
philosophyClosing: If you're ready to make some real career decisions, let go of old habits, and bring purpose into your work again, let me be your guide.

imagineItems.text: Feeling proud to present your latest work projects
Your first day at a brand new job
Finally asking for the pay rise you deserve
Going for the promotion with confidence
No more Sunday scaries — only genuine excitement when Monday rolls around
Finally starting the business you've secretly dreamed of
Leaving that old work environment behind, and walking into a bright new office

roadmapSubtext2: This is your roadmap to a career that you're proud of:

roadmapSteps.title: Step One — Career Audit
roadmapSteps.subtitle: The Self-Audit
roadmapSteps.description: Over the first four sessions, you'll get curious about your career journey so far. We'll gently audit your self‑beliefs, what "stuck" looks like in your career right now, and what a fulfilling professional life could look like. This phase is about noticing without judgement what stories have kept you small, or at a crossroads at work. By the end of the first four weeks, we'll have shone a light on your career, and where you want to be.

roadmapSteps.title: Step Two — Work Refocus Method
roadmapSteps.subtitle: Refocus & Reframe
roadmapSteps.description: Once your inner landscape is mapped, we'll work on the emotions underpinning your stories and how these have impacted your career decisions. By using emotional intelligence scripts, you'll start to see emotions as information, how to speak to yourself with compassion, and adopt a mindset of personal responsibility. You'll get clear on your work skills, what's no longer serving you, and see how micro steps can create tangible shifts in your work life.

roadmapSteps.title: Step Three — Integration
roadmapSteps.subtitle: Clarity to Confidence
roadmapSteps.description: In the final month, our focus shifts to integrating what you've learned, exploring these new insights in your work environment. You'll practise new habits, set boundaries, and step out of your comfort zone — from applying to new roles, pivoting in your career, or reshaping your current position so that it lights you up. This is where confidence grows: your renewed clarity translates into decisive actions that create a career you love.

experienceItems: Personalised self‑concept audit and diagnostic tools
Emotional intelligence coaching and practical reframing scripts
Weekly assignments and journaling prompts to embed new habits
Gentle accountability check‑ins and support between sessions
Guided integration exercises to apply insights in real‑life situations
Resources for continued growth beyond the programme
ctaSectionParagraph1: Decisions might feel hard right now. Start with a free discovery call to find out if my career coaching can help you.
ctaSectionParagraph2: We'll do the figuring out together.
